title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via a proxy.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs and embedders in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with markdown, code highlighting, and multi-model chats.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Simple Discord bot that forwards user prompts to a local Ollama instance and replies in-channel.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with conversation history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline code suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU node selector and PVC for model cache.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings for the Ollama local LLM server.

title: ollama-py
summary: Official PyPI package offering synchronous and asynchronous Python clients for Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI that talks to Ollama via its REST API with session memory and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app exposing Ollama models through REST endpoints with API-key authentication and usage logs.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-kotlin
summary: Experimental Kotlin multiplatform SDK for Ollama (JVM/Android targets).

title: ollama-macos-swift
summary: Swift package wrapping the Ollama REST API for native macOS/iOS apps.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready docker-compose stack with Ollama, Open-WebUI, Nginx, and automatic HTTPS via Let's Encrypt.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for Ollama users sharing models, troubleshooting, and showcasing integrations.
